steps.title: Lint repo/key/route aliases without printing secrets
Dry-run archive a tiny fixture through the bridge
steps.command: node local-bridge/openpatch-ledger-cli.mjs archive-base64 --project openpatch-smoke --round smoke-001 --file webai-roundpack.zip --content-base64 ZHVtbXk= --dry-run

steps.title: Load unpacked extension in dedicated Chrome Dev profile
steps.expected: extension loads; no real upload required

steps.title: Open a ChatGPT page with a test attachment and verify v11 marker/status badge
Archive-only upload to a single fine-grained PAT test repo
Install adapter into the current Auto Continue script as a module, not a hard merge
steps.expected: adapter can request roundpack and wait for archive receipt

stop_conditions: config-lint has errors before real upload
unexpected token/key value appears in output
